title: CurseCraft: A Jujutsu Kaisen Mod
description: This is a mod based on the famous Anime/Manga Jujutsu Kaisen
body:
Like the summary sais this is a mod based on Jujutsu Kaisen
You may encounter some bugs and it has almost no content but i will update every week
The Current Abillitys Are
- Cleave And Dismantle (doesent really work right now)
- Boogie Woogie 
- Yuji

And Current Taijutsu's Are
- Divergent Fist

Cursed Spirits
- Roppongi Curse


Multiplayer Support: Yes() No() Idk(x)
Tested: Thouroughly() Well(x) Kind of() No()

[Discord]:(https://discord.gg/W4RN7QruWU)
